parameters.text:
=🔔 *FSH Approval Required*

*Task:* {{ $json.task_type }} ({{ $json.pillar }})
*Approval Level:* {{ $json.approval_level }}
*Reason:* {{ $json.reason }}
*Task ID:* `{{ $json.task_id }}`
*Approval ID:* `{{ $json.approval_id }}`

<http://localhost:8000/approve/{{ $json.approval_id }}|✅ Approve> | <http://localhost:8000/reject/{{ $json.approval_id }}|❌ Reject>

parameters.subject: =FSH Approval Required: {{ $json.task_type }} ({{ $json.pillar }})

parameters.query: UPDATE approval_requests SET notified_at = NOW() WHERE approval_id = '{{ $json.approval_id }}'
